scripts.build: chant build src --lexicon aws -o templates/infra.json && chant build src --lexicon k8s -o k8s.yaml
scripts.deploy-infra: aws cloudformation deploy --template-file templates/infra.json --stack-name eks-microservice --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM --parameter-overrides domainName=${DOMAIN:-api.eks-microservice-demo.dev} publicAccessCidr=${CIDR:-0.0.0.0/0}
scripts.configure-kubectl: aws eks update-kubeconfig --name eks-microservice --region $(aws configure get region)
scripts.status: kubectl get pods -n microservice && kubectl get ingress -n microservice && kubectl get daemonsets -n amazon-cloudwatch && kubectl get daemonsets -n amazon-metrics
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun run deploy-infra && bun run configure-kubectl && bun run load-outputs && bun run build:k8s && bun run apply && bun run wait && bun run status
